name: Detroit Golf Sim
about: Detroit Golf Sim is a dedicated golf simulation facility in Clawson, Michigan, offering hourly bay rentals and monthly memberships. The venue features high-end Uneekor Eye XR launch monitors and GSPro software, providing players with 19 data points for practice and play on over 1000 virtual courses. Pricing is structured around a $30 hourly rate, with packages available for multi-hour bookings and a $150 unlimited monthly option, making it suitable for both casual players and serious golfers looking for technology-driven practice or entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Uneekor Eye XR launch monitor with 19 data points and no need for ball stickers
GSPro software access to over 1000 of the world's most popular golf courses
Affordable pricing model with hourly, package, and membership options
Immersive experience with 15' wide 4k projection screen

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policies not specified
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policies not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing 19 club and ball data points without sticker requirement

faq.answer: No information is provided regarding outside food or drink policies.
